allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "e:\\2Titan OSINT"; $job = Start-Job { Set-Location "e:\\2Titan OSINT"; npx next dev 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep 12; $output = Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job; $output)

PowerShell(Set-Location "e:\\2Titan OSINT"; $job = Start-Job { Set-Location "e:\\2Titan OSINT"; npx next dev --port 3002 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep 14; $output = Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job; $output | Select-Object -First 12)
PowerShell(cd "e:\\2Titan OSINT"; $job = Start-Job { cd "e:\\2Titan OSINT"; npm run dev 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)
